title: Cordcraft
description: Connect a Discord channel and Minecraft chat together
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a78e517a27ed999d4f4c0e321d8bb333a885c52f.png) Ever wanted an up to date discord to minecraft chat linker? look no further here it is.

Minecord is capable of: - Advancment embeds with color of advancment rarity. - Player join, leave, message, death and advancment events. - Custom embed icons. - Custom player head api. _(MUST support usernames's)_
